name: ptouch-cradle-test-tray-slot-fit-pair
description: Test print: sliding fit verification between tray exterior (103.2 × 94.2 mm) and cradle slot (103.9 × 94.9 mm) with 0.35 mm per-side clearance. Two pieces printed together: mini cradle slot (U-channel) + mini tray section (solid slug). User inserts the slug into the channel to verify feel before committing to the full ~150 cm³ two-part print.

params.note: All dimensions sourced directly from ptouch-cradle spec.json params. No shared params file exists for this project — parent SCAD files use inline parameters.
